sentences.target: On cherche le ballon sous la table.
sentences.reading: /ɔ̃ ʃɛʁʃ lə balɔ̃ su la tabl/

translations.fr: On cherche le ballon sous la table.
translations.ipa: /ɔ̃ ʃɛʁʃ lə balɔ̃ su la tabl/
translations.en: We’re looking for the balloon under the table.
translations.es: Buscamos la pelota debajo de la mesa.
translations.de: Wir suchen den Ball unter dem Tisch.
translations.it: Cerchiamo la palla sotto il tavolo.
translations.ko: 우리는 탁자 밑에서 공을 찾고 있어요.
translations.pt: Procuramos a bola debaixo da mesa.
translations.he: אנחנו מחפשים את הכדור מתחת לשולחן.
translations.vi: Chúng tôi đang tìm quả bóng dưới gầm bàn.
translations.ar: نحن نبحث عن الكرة تحت الطاولة.
translations.nl: We zoeken de bal onder de tafel.
translations.hu: A labdát keressük az asztal alatt.
translations.hi: हम मेज़ के नीचे गेंद ढूंढ़ रहे हैं.
translations.el: Ψάχνουμε την μπάλα κάτω από το τραπέζι.
translations.nb: Vi leter etter ballen under bordet.
translations.id: Kami mencari bola di bawah meja.
translations.sv: Vi letar efter bollen under bordet.
translations.da: Vi leder efter bolden under bordet.
translations.ja: テーブルの下でボールを探しています。

tokens.explanation: Subject personal pronoun (impersonal/3rd sg), commonly used for 'we'; functions as sentence subject.
Main verb; present indicative, 3rd person singular; transitive.
Definite article; masculine singular determiner.
Common noun; masculine singular; direct object of the verb.
Preposition introducing a locative prepositional phrase.
Definite article; feminine singular determiner.
Common noun; feminine singular; object of the preposition 'sous'.

sentences.target: Je gonfle le ballon pour la fête.
sentences.reading: /ʒə gɔ̃fl lə balɔ̃ puʁ la fɛt/

translations.fr: Je gonfle le ballon pour la fête.
translations.ipa: /ʒə gɔ̃fl lə balɔ̃ puʁ la fɛt/
translations.en: I’m inflating the balloon for the party.
translations.es: Estoy inflando el globo para la fiesta.
translations.de: Ich blase den Luftballon für die Party auf.
translations.it: Gonfio il palloncino per la festa.
translations.pt: Estou enchendo o balão para a festa.
translations.vi: Tôi đang thổi bóng bay cho bữa tiệc.
translations.nl: Ik blaas de ballon op voor het feest.
translations.uk: Я надуваю повітряну кульку для свята.
translations.hi: मैं पार्टी के लिए गुब्बारा फुला रहा हूँ.
translations.el: Φουσκώνω το μπαλόνι για το πάρτι.
translations.nb: Jeg blåser opp ballongen til festen.
translations.sv: Jag blåser upp ballongen till festen.
translations.da: Jeg puster ballonen op til festen.
translations.ja: パーティーのために風船をふくらませています。

tokens.explanation: Subject personal pronoun; 1st person singular.
Main verb; present indicative, 1st person singular; transitive.
Definite article; masculine singular determiner.
Common noun; masculine singular; direct object of the verb.
Preposition marking purpose; introduces a prepositional phrase.
Definite article; feminine singular determiner.
Common noun; feminine singular; object of the preposition 'pour'.

sentences.target: Le ballon roule vers le petit chien.
sentences.reading: /lə balɔ̃ ʁul vɛʁ lə pəti ʃjɛ̃/

translations.fr: Le ballon roule vers le petit chien.
translations.ipa: /lə balɔ̃ ʁul vɛʁ lə pəti ʃjɛ̃/
translations.en: The balloon rolls toward the small dog.
translations.es: La pelota rueda hacia el perrito.
translations.de: Der Ball rollt auf den kleinen Hund zu.
translations.it: La palla rotola verso il cagnolino.
translations.pt: A bola rola em direção ao cachorrinho.
translations.vi: Quả bóng lăn về phía chú chó nhỏ.
translations.nl: De bal rolt naar het kleine hondje toe.
translations.hu: A labda a kiskutya felé gurul.
translations.hi: गेंद छोटे कुत्ते की ओर लुढ़क रही है.
translations.pl: Piłka toczy się w stronę małego pieska.
translations.el: Η μπάλα κυλά προς το μικρό σκυλάκι.
translations.nb: Ballen ruller mot den lille hunden.
translations.id: Bola menggelinding ke arah anak anjing kecil.
translations.sv: Bollen rullar mot den lilla hunden.
translations.ro: Mingea se rostogolește spre cățelul mic.
translations.cs: Míč se kutálí směrem k malému pejskovi.
translations.da: Bolden ruller mod den lille hund.
translations.ja: ボールが小さな犬のほうへ転がっていきます。

tokens.explanation: Definite article; masculine singular determiner.
Common noun; masculine singular; sentence subject.
Intransitive main verb; present indicative, 3rd person singular.
Preposition of direction; heads a prepositional phrase.
Definite article; masculine singular determiner.
Attributive adjective; masculine singular; agrees with 'chien'.
Common noun; masculine singular; object of the preposition 'vers'.

sentences.target: Ils oublient le ballon dans le jardin.
sentences.reading: /ilz ubli lə balɔ̃ dɑ̃ lə ʒaʁdɛ̃/

translations.fr: Ils oublient le ballon dans le jardin.
translations.ipa: /ilz ubli lə balɔ̃ dɑ̃ lə ʒaʁdɛ̃/
translations.en: They forget the balloon in the garden.
translations.es: Olvidan la pelota en el jardín.
translations.de: Sie vergessen den Ball im Garten.
translations.zh-Hans: 他们把球忘在花园里了。
translations.yue: 佢哋唔記得咗個波喺花園度。
translations.pt: Eles esquecem a bola no jardim.
translations.vi: Họ quên quả bóng trong vườn.
translations.nl: Ze vergeten de bal in de tuin.
translations.hi: वे गेंद को बगीचे में भूल जाते हैं.
translations.ja: 彼らは庭にボールを置き忘れます。
